mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalReviewCount, COALESCE(AVG(score), 0) AS avgScore, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS score1Count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS score2Count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS score3Count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS score4Count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS score5Count FROM t_order_sku_review WHERE del_flag = 0 AND spu_id = #{spuId}

SELECT id, order_no, order_detail_sku_id, spu_id, sku_id, shop_id, user_id, score, content, image_urls, user_name_snapshot, user_avatar_snapshot, create_time, update_time, del_flag FROM t_order_sku_review WHERE del_flag = 0 AND spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN image_urls IS NULL OR image_urls = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC
